implementation_summary: A single-file HTML5 2D physics artillery game adapted for portrait mobile. The player (bottom-left) drags to aim and fires projectiles at the enemy castle (top-right). The enemy auto-fires at fixed intervals. Health bars track damage. The game ends when either castle is destroyed, showing a call-to-action.

screen.responsive_strategy: Scale to fit window using CSS transform, maintaining 9:16 aspect ratio. Overflow is hidden.

gameplay.objective: Destroy the enemy castle before your castle is destroyed.
gameplay.primary_interaction: Drag anywhere on the screen to pull back a virtual slingshot, adjusting angle and power. Release to fire.
gameplay.loss_or_timeout_condition: Player castle health reaches 0, or 30 seconds elapse.

entities.behavior: Static, scaled to cover the logical screen.
Static at bottom-left. Takes damage from enemy projectiles.
Static at top-right. Takes damage from player projectiles. Auto-fires at player.
Mounted on player castle. Rotates to match drag aim angle.
Spawns on release, follows parabolic physics trajectory, explodes on impact.
Spawns on timer, follows calculated parabolic trajectory towards player castle.
Canvas-drawn dotted line showing predicted path of projectile during drag.
Canvas-drawn or DOM-based red/green bars above respective castles.

asset_plan.processing: Base64 encode into HTML audio tag
Base64 encode into HTML audio tag

interaction_flow.system_response: Show pulsing 'Drag to Aim' hand tutorial over player castle. Enemy timer starts.
Hide tutorial. Draw dotted trajectory line based on drag vector. Rotate player weapon.
Hide trajectory line. Spawn player projectile with velocity derived from drag vector. Play SFX.
Projectile hits enemy castle. Spawn CSS/Canvas particle explosion. Reduce enemy health bar. Screen shake.
If health <= 0, trigger End Card UI with 'Download Now' button.

parameters.name: gravity
parameters.gameplay_effect: Changes the arc of the projectiles, affecting aiming difficulty.

parameters.name: player_damage
parameters.gameplay_effect: Determines how many hits it takes to destroy the enemy castle (default 3 hits).

parameters.name: enemy_fire_rate_ms
parameters.gameplay_effect: Controls the pressure on the player. Lower means faster enemy attacks.

parameters.name: enemy_damage
parameters.gameplay_effect: Determines how quickly the player loses.

acceptance_criteria: Game runs entirely from a single HTML file with no external network requests.
File size is under 5MB (achieved by base64 encoding only necessary PNGs and compressing audio if used).
Drag-to-aim mechanic feels responsive on mobile touch screens.
Trajectory line accurately predicts the physics arc of the projectile.
Collisions between projectiles and castles register reliably.
End card displays correctly when win/loss condition is met.
non_goals_v1: Dynamic mesh destruction or slicing of castle sprites.
Complex character animations or parsing PSB files.
Multiple weapon types or switching mechanics.
Landscape mode support (forcing portrait for mobile optimization).
